name: Spawner Box
description: A box that spawns 3× the normal amount of marbles when tapped. Floods the funnel and belt!
howToPlay: Tap a Spawner box (marked with ×3) to release 27 marbles instead of the usual 9. Use them to fill sort columns fast — but watch the belt!

showcaseLevel.name: Spawner Demo
showcaseLevel.desc: Try the new Spawner box type
